司令官殿！ ご報告であります！<br>先日ご命令いただいた岩盤の爆破、つつがなく:
Lord Commander! I have a report! The bedrock blasting you ordered
has been completed without incident!
完成した特製爆薬のお陰で作業効率が一気に上がったのであります！<br>これで、新:
Thanks to the special explosive we completed, our work efficiency
skyrocketed! This opens a shortcut to the new mining area!
え？ わたしへの褒美……でありますか？ いえいえ！<br>司令官殿のお役に立てた:
A reward for me? No, no! Being of service to Lord Commander is
reward enough!
褒美は、是非、一緒にがんばったわたしの部下たちにあげてください！<br>荒くれ者:
Please give the reward to my subordinates who worked hard alongside
me! They may be a rowdy bunch, but they are all top-tier workers!
ですので、次の任務も是非、このわたし達にお任せを！<br>さて、わたしはこれから:
So please entrust the next mission to us as well! Now, I will prepare a
banquet for my subordinates!
